subject: Re: various
body:
prtoest as loud as  you can.. it's your bill


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, April 24, 2007 9:59:46 AM
Subject: FW: various


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: john stefanidis [mailto:johnstefanidis174@yahoo.co.uk] 
Sent: Tuesday, April 24, 2007 8:58 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: various


>After Abigail making such good time running in the London Marathon - 41/2 hours - I trust you will join me and run next year.
>How was Istanbul ? The hotel I was telling you about Ciragan [soft c] Kempinski -advantage is easy acess to  boat to zoom along the Bosphoros.As i think i told you I am doing a second yali this time on the European side. 
>Have had an invoice from Macfarlanes for £ 25.000 rather steep compared to my lawyers Goodman Derrick who charged £11.500.Can I protest ? 
>I was a week in Mustique on my way to Ohio early March -quite nice but very different from what it was in Colin [Tennant] Glenconner's day - has his fame reached your island ?
All the best Yrs John
